section_name: Commission Vote Required for Grant or Loan
text:
Under this subchapter, the commission may not make:

(1) a grant unless two-thirds of the entire commission votes in favor of the grant; or

(2) a loan unless a majority of the entire commission votes in favor of the loan.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.103 — Commission Vote Required for Grant or Loan

Under this subchapter, the commission may not make:

    (1) a grant unless two-thirds of the entire commission votes in favor of the grant; or

    (2) a loan unless a majority of the entire commission votes in favor of the loan.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Under this subchapter, the commission may not make:
a grant unless two-thirds of the entire commission votes in favor of the grant; or
a loan unless a majority of the entire commission votes in favor of the loan.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
